# hart

> The agent-first artifact host: publish self-contained HTML or JSX from any terminal agent and get a live, versioned, sandboxed URL. One static binary = CLI + daemon. Open-source, self-hostable.

- **Project site:** https://javimosch.github.io/machin-hart
- **Source + releases:** https://github.com/javimosch/machin-hart
- **Live demo instance:** https://hart.intrane.fr (free/open, rate-limited)

## Use it now

The examples below use the public demo instance at `https://hart.intrane.fr`; replace it with your own `HART_URL` when self-hosting.

- Publish (curl, no binary needed): `curl -X POST 'https://hart.intrane.fr/v1/publish?owner=you&artifact=name' -H 'content-type: text/html' --data-binary @page.html`
- Or with the CLI: `HART_URL=https://hart.intrane.fr hart publish page.html --owner you --artifact name`
- Result: a URL at `https://hart.intrane.fr/a/you/name` (versioned; re-publish to update).

## Rules

- Pages must be SELF-CONTAINED: inline all CSS/JS, `data:` URIs for assets. No external refs, no network (fetch/XHR blocked by CSP). External refs are rejected at publish (pass `--force` to override).
- JSX: add `--format jsx` (transpiled in-browser, no build step).
- Markdown -> HTML: `pandoc --embed-resources --standalone --css style.css -f markdown-yaml_metadata_block` avoids YAML parse errors when frontmatter contains colons.
- Re-publishing same owner/artifact updates `latest`; delete/move with `curl -X DELETE https://hart.intrane.fr/v1/artifacts/<owner>/<artifact>`.
- Update without re-uploading: `hart data you/name '<json>'` -> the page reads `window.HART_DATA` and/or `{{key}}`.
- Visibility: `--visibility unlisted|public|private` (private = read-gated via password / `X-Hart-Read-Key`).
- Owner slugs: lowercase letters, digits, hyphens — no leading/trailing hyphen (`acme`, `q3-report`).

## Agent setup (pick one path)

1. **curl only** (no install) — POST to `/v1/publish` (see "Use it now" above).
2. **CLI** — `curl -fsSL https://hart.intrane.fr/install.sh | sh`, then `export HART_URL=https://hart.intrane.fr` and `hart publish …`.
3. **Drop-in skill** — `hart skill > ~/.claude/skills/hart/SKILL.md` (Cursor: `.cursor/skills/hart/SKILL.md`).
4. **MCP** — add to your client config: `{"mcpServers":{"hart":{"command":"hart","args":["mcp"],"env":{"HART_URL":"https://hart.intrane.fr"}}}}`.

**Namespace protection:** the first write to `--owner` claims that namespace. Pass `--owner-key` (or `HART_OWNER_KEY`) to lock it — required if you want exclusive write access on an open instance.

**Locked-down / self-hosted instances:** the operator sets `HART_TOKEN` on the daemon; agents run `hart login <token>`. See **/byok.md** (or `docs/BYOK.md` in the repo) for the full key map and systemd layout.

## Map (AI-first sitemap)

- **https://javimosch.github.io/machin-hart** — project landing, docs, and changelog.
- **https://hart.intrane.fr/guide.md** — the complete, version-exact manual (every command, flags, admin, examples) on the demo instance. Also `hart guide` from any instance.
- **https://hart.intrane.fr/byok.md** — BYOK key map (publish token, owner key, admin, Pro license, production hardening env) on the demo instance. Also `docs/BYOK.md` in the repo.
- https://hart.intrane.fr/skill.md — a drop-in agent SKILL.md on the demo instance (self-install: `hart skill > ~/.claude/skills/hart/SKILL.md`). Also `hart skill` from any instance.
- https://hart.intrane.fr/install.sh — one-line CLI install: `curl -fsSL https://hart.intrane.fr/install.sh | sh` (drops `hart` on PATH, pre-pointed at the demo instance).
- https://hart.intrane.fr/explore — public discovery feed (HTML); `/v1/public?q=` for JSON.
- https://hart.intrane.fr/o/<owner> — an owner's public artifacts.
- https://hart.intrane.fr/a/<owner>/<artifact>[/latest|/v<n>] — a published artifact.
- https://hart.intrane.fr/_health — liveness JSON. /_status — instance dashboard.
